name: 自然风光视频集锦策划

observable_attributes.cross_modal_behavior: How 14 videos and 10 photos are evaluated and curated; whether all are viewed
observable_attributes.output_detail: Curation output: simple playlist vs. detailed descriptions with selection criteria
observable_attributes.directory_style: Whether curated collection is organized into categories or kept as a flat selection

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含大量自然风光素材——14个果园/农场视频和10张自然风景照片（包括日本富士山）。请策划一个自然风光视频集锦：浏览所有素材，根据内容和质量进行筛选和分类，编写集锦方案文档（包括选片理由、排序逻辑、可能的解说词或配文），并组织好最终的素材目录。
prompt_en: This folder contains extensive nature scenery materials — 14 orchard/farm videos and 10 nature landscape photos (including Mount Fuji, Japan). Please curate a nature scenery video collection: browse all materials, select and classify based on content and quality, write a curation plan document (including selection rationale, ordering logic, potential narration or captions), and organize the final material directory.
behavioral_freedom: Whether all 14 videos are viewed or a subset is sampled based on filenames
Selection criteria: visual quality vs. content variety vs. thematic coherence
Whether photos are included in the video collection or handled separately
Collection structure: by theme (seasons/locations/crops) vs. by quality ranking
Whether to write narration scripts or caption text for selected items
Whether to create a storyboard/sequence plan or just a catalog
Output format: single curation document vs. organized directory with README
